ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Recent Purchase at Acme Corp
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We want to inform you that a transaction of $129.99 was processed on your account (Account ending in 8421) at 3:15 PM (ET) on 12‑August‑2024. The purchase was made at Acme Corp via our online portal.

If you recognize this transaction, no further action is required. If you do not recognize this charge, please contact our support team immediately at <URL> or call 1‑800‑555‑0199.

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,
Customer Service Team
XYZ Bank

spam.subject: URGENT: QuickBooks/Norton Invoice Payment Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Our records indicate that an invoice for QuickBooks and Norton licensing fees totaling $5,499.00 has not been paid. Failure to remit payment by 20‑August‑2024 may result in suspension of your software licenses and potential legal action.

Please log into your QuickBooks portal and complete the payment at the following link: <URL>. If you have already paid, please disregard this notice.

Thank you for your immediate attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Accounts Receivable
QuickBooks Support Team
